full_text:
Guan Yong
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guan Yong. Given a army post for Zhuge Liang’s first Northern Campaign. Guan Yong may not have existed in history. Guan Yong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
